SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PTD_MDCR_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable does not include all costs to Medicare for the Part D benefit; it does not include non-
covered drugs (PDE variable called NCVRD_PLAN_PD_AMT) also does not consider include any 
applicable rebate amounts or other discounts).
